prompt: Create a cinematic full-body editorial fashion photograph of a stylish young East Asian man arriving at the 2026 Met Gala red carpet, standing confidently on glossy black marble steps outside The Met at night. He wears a luxurious Saint Laurent-inspired black couture tuxedo with a sharp double-breasted jacket, satin lapels, asymmetrical wrapped waist detail tied into a dramatic side knot, crisp white open-collar dress shirt, slim tailored black trousers, white pocket square, and polished black leather dress boots. Pose him slightly angled toward camera with one hand in his trouser pocket and the other relaxed at his side, long legs emphasized, elegant calm expression, red-carpet celebrity presence. The background shows a grand museum staircase with warm stone architecture, the words “THE MET” softly visible on the wall, suited guests on the steps, and a dense crowd of photographers on the left with camera flashes firing. Use dramatic low-key lighting, warm spotlights, strong flash highlights, shallow depth of field, realistic skin and fabric texture, glossy reflections on the marble floor, high-fashion magazine composition, vertical 3:4 framing, ultra-realistic gpt-image-2 style. Keep exactly one main subject, include many blurred background photographers and guests but no extra foreground models, no watermark, no logos besides the visible “THE MET” wall text.
